narrative:
Westerville 1-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 786 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.8 percentage points.
